scripts.seed: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:load-local
scripts.db:migrate: apps/astro/node_modules/.bin/wrangler d1 migrations apply movies-that-feel-like --local --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:load-local: npm run load -w apps/pipeline -- --reset --sql-out data/working/load-d1.sql && npm run d1:apply
scripts.d1:apply: apps/astro/node_modules/.bin/wrangler d1 execute movies-that-feel-like --local --command 'PRAGMA foreign_keys=OFF; DELETE FROM recommendation_evidence; DELETE FROM vibe_tags; DELETE FROM imported_post_images; DELETE FROM recommendations; DELETE FROM imported_vibe_posts;' --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc && apps/astro/node_modules/.bin/wrangler d1 execute movies-that-feel-like --local --file "$(pwd)/data/working/load-d1.sql" --config apps/astro/wrangler.jsonc
